import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
_cache = {}
_registry = {}


def clear_cache():
    global _cache
    _cache = {}


def register_service(name, service):
    _registry[name] = service


def handle_reset_command():
    global _cache
    _cache = {}
    logger.info("Cache cleared")


def handle_bulk_import(records):
    for record in records:
        _cache[record["id"]] = record
    logger.info(f"Imported {len(records)} records")


def handle_cleanup_command():
    _registry.clear()
    _cache.clear()
    logger.info("All state cleared")
